mapper.sql: pejs.date, pejs.employee_id, pejs.job_id, pejs.dept_id, pejs.attribute1, pejs.attribute2, pejs.attribute3, pejs.attribute4, pejs.attribute5, pejs.id, pejs.create_time, pejs.create_by, pejs.update_time, pejs.update_by, pejs.work_attendance_flag, pejs.workshop_attendance_flag

${tAlias}.date as ${tAlias}_date, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.job_id as ${tAlias}_job_id, ${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_dept_id, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.work_attendance_flag as ${tAlias}_work_attendance_flag,${tAlias}.workshop_attendance_flag as ${tAlias}_workshop_attendance_flag
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_job_snapshot (date, employee_id, job_id, dept_id, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{date,jdbcType=DATE}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} , #{work_attendance_flag, jdbcType=BIT} , #{workshop_attendance_flag, jdbcType=BIT} )

insert into pm_employee_job_snapshot (date, employee_id, job_id, dept_id, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, work_attendance_flag,workshop_attendance_flag ) select #{date,jdbcType=DATE}, pej.employee_id, pej.job_id, pej.dept_id, '' ,'' ,'' ,'' ,'', #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, pe.work_attendance_flag, pe.workshop_attendance_flag from pm_employee_job pej, pm_employee pe where pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.employee_id = pe.id
mapper.update: update pm_employee_job_snapshot set date = #{date,jdbcType=DATE}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, job_id = #{jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, work_attendance_flag = #{workAttendanceFlag,jdbcType =BIT}, workshop_attendance_flag = #{workshopAttendanceFlag, jdbcType = BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select count(*) from pm_employee_job_snapshot pejs where DateDiff(dd,pejs.date,getdate())=0

select
,
,
from pm_employee_job_snapshot pejs, fnd_dept_snapshot fds, ac_dept_attendance ada where pejs.dept_id = fds.dept_id and fds.attendance_id = ada.id and pejs.date = fds.date and work_attendance_flag = 1 and workshop_attendance_flag = 0 and pejs.date between #{dateFrom,jdbcType=DATE} and #{dateTo,jdbcType=DATE}
